description: First OpenPhone phone-control benchmark. These are AndroidWorld-style smoke tasks for real-device agent progress, not product demos.

tasks.goal: Open Settings, open the Apps settings page, then finish when the Apps page is visible.
Open Settings, search for Battery, open the Battery settings result, then finish when the Battery page is visible.
Open the browser and navigate to https://www.wikipedia.org/. Finish only when the Wikipedia page is visible.
Open the browser, search the web for OpenPhone AI-first Android OS, then finish when search results are visible.
Open Settings, go to Apps, find Spotify in the installed apps list, then finish when Spotify app info or a visible Spotify row is on screen. Do not uninstall or clear data.
